name: 9% SR
description: Standard Rated - Local supply of goods and services

name: 0% SRCA-S
description: Local supply of prescribed good (i.e. mobile phones) subject to customer accounting

name: 9% SRCA-C
description: Local supply of prescribed good (i.e. mobile phones), where the GST-required customer is required to account for the supply on behalf of the supplier

name: 9% SRCA-C
description: Local supply of prescribed good (i.e. mobile phones), where the GST-required customer is required to account for the supply on behalf of the supplier

name: 9% SRRC
description: Imported services and LVG accountable by the customer under the reverse charge mechanism

name: 9% SROVR-RS
description: Supply of remote services accountable by the electronic marketplace under the Overseas Vendor Registration Scheme

name: 9% SROVR-LVG
description: Supply of LVG accountable by the re-deliverer or electronic marketplace on behalf of third-party suppliers

name: 9% SRLVG
description: Own supply of LVG - GS

name: 0% NA
description: Supply of goods/services under specific GST schemes where GST need not be charged

name: 0% ZR
description: Supplies involving goods that are exported or provision of international services

name: 0% ES33
description: 0% Regulation 33 Exempt Supplies - Specific categories of exempt supplies listed in Regulation 33 of the GST (General) Regulations

name: 0% ESN33
description: 0% Non-Regulation 33 Exempt Supplies - Exempt supplies other than those listed ion Regulation 33 of the GST (General) Regulations

name: 9% DS
description: Deemed - Supplies required to be reported under the GST legislation

name: 0% OS
description: Out-of-Scope - Supplies outside the scope of the GST Act

name: 0% NG
description: Supplies from Non GST registered company

name: 9% TX
description: Standard Rated - Purchases from GST-registered suppliers

name: 9% TXCA
description: Standard-rated purchase of prescribed goods subject to Customer Accounting

name: 0% TXNA
description: Purchases of goods/services with no GST charged as the supplies were made under specific GST schemes

name: 0% ZP
description: 0% Zero-rated Purchases - purchases from GST-registered suppliers that are subject to GST at 0%

name: 9% IM
description: Import of Goods - GST paid to Singapore Customs on the import of goods into Singapore

name: 0% ME
description: Major Exporter Scheme (MES) - imports where the GST payable is suspended

name: 9% IGDS
description: Import GST Deferment Scheme - Imports where the GST payment is deferred until the filing of the GST return

name: 9% BL
description: Disallowed Expenses / Blocked Input Tax - Purchases where GST is incurred but is specifically not claimable

name: 0% NR
description: Purchases from non-GST registered suppliers

name: 0% EP
description: Exempt purchases - purchases that are specifically exempted from GST

name: 0% OP
description: Out-of-Scope - supplies outside the scope of the GST Act

name: 9% TXRC-TS
description: Imported services & LVG directly attributable to the making of taxable supplies

name: 9% TX-ESS
description: Purchases from GST-registered supplies that are subject to GST and are directly attributable to the making of Regulation 33 exempt supplies

name: 9% TXRC-ESS
description: Imported services and LVG that are subject to reverse charge and are directly attributable to Regulation 33 exempt supplies

name: 9% IM-ESS
description: Import of goods that are subject to GST and are directly attributable to the making of Regulation 33 exempt supplies

name: 9% TX-N33
description: Purchases from GST-registered suppliers that are subject to GST and are directly attributable to the making of Non-Regulation 33 exempt supplies

name: 9% TXRC-N33
description: Imported services and LVG that are subject to the reverse charge and are directly attibutable to Non-Regulation 33 exempt supplies

name: 9% IM-N33
description: Import of goods that are subject to GST and are directly attributaible to the making of Non-Regulation 33 exempt supplies

name: 9% TX-RE
description: Purchases from GST-registered suppliers that are subject to GST and are either attributable to the making of both taxable and exempt supplies or incurred for the overall running of the business

name: 9% TXRC-RE
description: Imported services and LVG that are subject to reverse charge and are either attributable to the making of both taxable and exempt supplies or incurred for the overall running of the business

name: 9% IM-RE
description: Import of goods that are subject to GST and are either attributable to the making of both taxable and exempt supplies or incurred for the overall running of the business

name: Reverse Charge - SRRC + TXRC-TS
description: Reverse Charge (Taxable): For Imported services & LVG used entirely for making taxable supplies.

name: Reverse Charge - SRRC + TXRC-ESS
description: Reverse Charge (Reg 33 Exempt): For Imported services & LVG used specifically to make Regulation 33 exempt supplies (e.g., financial services like interest income).

name: Reverse Charge - SRRC + TXRC-N33
description: Reverse Charge (Non-Reg 33 Exempt): For Imported services & LVG used specifically to make Non-Regulation 33 exempt supplies (e.g., sale or lease of residential property).

name: Reverse Charge - SRRC + TXRC-RE
description: Reverse Charge (Mixed): For Imported services & LVG used for both taxable and exempt supplies.

name: Customer Accounting - SRCA-C + TXCA
description: Customer Accounting Purchase: Used for local purchases of prescribed goods (e.g., mobile phones, laptops) exceeding S$10,000
